title: Something borrowed, something new.
description: Extreme close-up of Toy Freddy announcing the sequel weeks after the original's success.
notes: Verify the exact posted date on thefnafarchive.org.

title: I am still here.
description: Springtrap's decayed face emerging from darkness — the community's first look at the saga's true antagonist.
notes: Verify the exact posted date on thefnafarchive.org.

title: NIGHTMARE
hiddenContent: Brightening the image reveals a faint '87' hidden on Nightmare Fredbear's hat.
description: Nightmare Fredbear announcing the 'final chapter', posted around the franchise's first anniversary.
notes: Verify the exact posted date on thefnafarchive.org.

title: Or was it me?
description: Nightmare Foxy joining the 'Was it me?' teaser series — each nightmare pleading guilt over the Bite.
notes: Part of a multi-image series; map the remaining entries from thefnafarchive.org.

title: FNaF World
description: A sudden burst of color on the usually pitch-black site: the Adventure cast announcing the RPG spin-off.
notes: Verify the exact posted date on thefnafarchive.org.

title: There was never just one.
description: Circus Baby's debut image, reframing the entire series' scale with a single caption.
notes: Verify the exact posted date on thefnafarchive.org.

title: Don't hold it against us.
description: The Funtime cast assembled in the dark ahead of Sister Location's reveal trailer.
notes: Verify the exact caption, cast and posted date on thefnafarchive.org.

title: CANCELLED. (due to leaks)
description: Scott's infamous prank days before launch, 'cancelling' Sister Location over story leaks — the game shipped on schedule.
notes: Verify the exact posted date on thefnafarchive.org.

title: Ultimate Custom Night roster
description: The gigantic character collage that grew over successive updates until it revealed all fifty selectable menaces.
notes: The collage evolved across several revisions; consider archiving each revision as its own entry.

title: Vanny
description: The white rabbit stalking the Mega Pizzaplex era, surfacing on scottgames.com around the PS5 showcase reveal.
notes: Verify the exact image and posted date on thefnafarchive.org.
